title: Part 4 – Exposé : annonce d'embarquement retardé
instructions: Écoutez l'annonce, puis répondez aux trois questions.
audioText: Attention, passengers waiting for flight 482 to Vancouver. We apologize for the delay. Due to heavy traffic on the runway, boarding will now begin at three forty-five instead of three fifteen. We thank you for your patience. While you wait, please remember that the gate area has limited seating, so priority will be given to passengers traveling with small children or those who need extra time to board. Once boarding begins, we will call passengers by zone, starting with zone one. Please have your boarding pass and identification ready. Again, we apologize for the inconvenience and look forward to having you on board shortly.

questions.explanation: "boarding will now begin at three forty-five instead of three fifteen".
"Due to heavy traffic on the runway".

questions.prompt: Who will be given priority during boarding?
choices: Passengers with small children or who need extra time
questions.explanation: "priority will be given to passengers traveling with small children or those who need extra time to board".
